security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote input can be altered without detection.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks mechanisms to prevent malicious vote alteration.

assumptions: The governance contract does not validate the integrity of the vote messages.
The actor can submit altered vote messages through the interface.

mitigation.strategy: Implement data integrity checks for vote messages.

description: An attacker may alter a legitimate vote to change its outcome.

security_gap.gap_description: The system does not provide mechanisms for verifiable vote attribution.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Lack of accountability for votes cast.

assumptions: Votes are not cryptographically signed or otherwise linked to a verifiable identity.
The governance contract does not maintain an immutable audit log of votes.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a secure audit log and cryptographic vote verification mechanisms.

description: An attacker may cast votes and deny their participation.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes may be exposed to unauthorized actors.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not protect the confidentiality of votes during transmission or storage.

assumptions: The system does not employ encryption or other confidentiality mechanisms for vote data.
The actor may have access to the data storage or communication channels.

mitigation.strategy: Encrypt vote data during transit and storage.

description: An attacker may gain access to votes before they are tallied.
